transcript.text:
[Today's food: Beef Brisket]
[Casting a spell]
[And it worked!]
[Wow x5]
[lol]
[No way?!]
Marbling
[Let's eat some beef brisket today!]
[Soybean Stew is a must!]
Incredible
If I can't finish all of this,
PD: You're only proving that you're human
[Proving herself to be a human being]
Hello everyone
I'm at Hannam-dong today
I've been searching for beef briskets because I've been craving it

I found this unique type of brisket called "hand-brisket" It's because they cut the slices by hand
It's a hidden gem here located in an alley
Ta-da! Here
[U N Garden] [Seoul, Yongsan-gu]
My name is Garden too (Jungwon means garden)
I heard that there are so many customers that the restaurant gets filled up by 6 o'clock
It looks like a regular home
Hello
[Scanning the menu]
Hand-brisket
It's probably because they cut it by hand
Other beef cuts sound delicious too
But we're here for brisket So let's just order that
[Owner comes in] Hello
Why is it called "hand-brisket"?
We slice the brisket cuts by hand

For brisket, one side is fat and one side is meat
If you use the machine, you will get some pieces with lots of fat and vice versa
But by cutting it manually, we are able to control the perfect fat to meat ratio a brisket is supposed to have
How thick is it?
It's a little thicker than regular brisket
If you look close enough, you will see that all pieces have different thickness
I'll do 20 servings of the hand-brisket
2.. 2..20 servings?
Also the beef soybean stew
-You're eating all of that by yourself? -Yes
130g each serving
So it's 2.6kg total
[Hello, this is the hand-brisket]
[These can't be compared to the machine-cut briskets]
[Marbling=Bling Bling]
[Here it comes]

Incredible
Thank you
[How many is this...?]
I don't think I can eat this much myself
I've had up to 1kg of meat But not brisket
Is brisket difficult to eat?
It can get too greasy when you eat a lot
Brisket cuts are usually rolled up or are plated very thinly on the plates,
But these aren't like that Looks like they took time to cut it
Let's give it a try
Check out the marbling Is this forreal?
PD: Wow
PD is saying "wow"
Wow
Yeah, can't help but to say "wow"
Wow

Wow PD: Wow
Wow
[Everybody say "wow..."]
Wow
I love it!
It's because I always take so much time to cook the meat
But these are cooking very fast!
I'll try one now
I'll try 1 without anything
Salt
These are thicker than your average beef brisket cuts
The fat part has some crunchiness to it
The meat is very tender
An explosion of goodness
It tastes so good, sir
[Hand flaps of truth]

With a little bit of salt
The texture
The perfect blend of the fat and the meat
The flavors and the juiciness They're all perfect
With some sauce this time
With a piece of perilla leaf
I'm so happy
Let's get more on the grill
Must cook more
Hurry
It tastes so good
I love how quickly it cooks
Wow That was fast
On low heat now
It tastes good with everything
Scallion kimchi

He said to cook the egg rolls too
Spiced radish
Everything's so good
Sliced garlic too
Pickled onions
What? Where did it go?
It's gone
Look at the colors
Makes me happy just by looking at it
Let's eat the egg rolls
Can't just eat 1 at a time
5 pieces
With some sliced scallions
[Steamed egg on the house]
Really? Thank you
They gave me this on the house

Looks good Puffy steamed egg
The visuals go crazy
Brisket on top
Isn't it getting too greasy?
It's still delicious!
I'll cook some to the crisp this time
Crispy brisket
This is even tastier!
Very savory
So good It's good crispy
It feels like the flavors are enhanced
So good
I'm good at eating veggies now
I can't eat stuff like mugworts and water dropworts, But these are fine
What am I doing?
Gotta cook more!

Look at the marbling Amazing...
There's so much grease here
I wonder how much grease it can gather Maybe 1 liter? Maybe more?
I like eating beef cooked rare
So I never knew cooking it to the crisp can be this tasty
1 bite of the steamed egg
Very delicious
It's hard to eat here without making a reservation
I had to make a reservation myself
[I'm the reason why making a reservation is necessary!]
[Is this meat stew or soybean stew?!]
[Beef soybean stew]
Thank you
Look at all the meat that's inside!
The size of the meat
I thought it was seonji (pork blood pudding)

I lot of blogs stated that the soybean stew is the best
I'll give it a try
I was told to pair it with rice because it's salty But I like salty foods
Tasty
It's perfect
This is home-cooked soybean stew
What you would have at home Without any artificial flavoring
This is so good
This is just what I like
That's so tasty
I love it so much
[How many plates is she on?!]
Amazing
[Soybean stew with beef brisket is always the way to go]
3 at once
[10 servings done]

I finished half
Incredible
I don't usually eat tofu, but I eat it if I like the stew
Tofu tastes good here
[More spiced radish]
Thank you
[This much radish?]
I want to order the stew to-go
Shall we cook more?
No breaks in between
[Can't permit any rest to the grill]
[Not even the mouth]
[Crispy]
Yum
Brisket is definitely more greasy than other cuts of meat
I can easily eat over 3kgs of meats like chuck flap and beef small intestines

But these give me a feeling
Like "a little too greasy"?
It's good, but it's also as greasy
7 plates down
I will finish the rest at home if I can't finish everything
I've always been able to eat more than 3kgs of meat
[But brisket is a little too difficult]
[Even the owner said so]
The greasy they are the better the brisket quality is
It's starting to get a little too greasy now
But I can cheat by eating some stew
Incredible
With some rice too
[It's Tzuyang!]
Hello
[OMG]

[Cute!]
Wrap the rice with brisket
I didn't think I can taste greasiness
I like all kinds of greasy food
Who are you?!
You're only proving that you're human
Well then, I'm human
That steps on my ego a little
[No... You already ate a good amount of food...]
I'll stop after this plate
My first defeat to meat
Some spiced radish like this
It catches all the greasiness
It's very flavorful
Just look at it
[Even the PD...]

Excuse me
I would like to get the stew to-go
Can I order 2 servings with lots of soup?
And also...
I'm always able to eat more than 3kgs of meat
[Making excuses as to why she was not able to finish the brisket]
It's okay No one said anything
Even that was a huge order for a big party
[No way you can eat it by yourself]
This excludes lots of fat
The brisket is round because of all the excess fat
That's how we plate it And lots of people feel that brisket is greasy
The fact that I couldn't eat 3kgs of meat today...
[...]
[A never-ending rant]
[STOP!!!!]

It's like fermented soybean
All done
I want more
1 last bite
[16 servings of hand-brisket cleared]
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
